props.description: New Article: A Field Guide to the 14 Rows Around a Belief Simulator

props.title: A Field Guide to the 14 Rows Around a Belief Simulator

props.text: In 2026's noisy agent-simulation space, the fastest way to orient is to read a project's own ecosystem roster as a map. MiroShark's ECOSYSTEM.md—14 named integrators across products, integrations, agents, tools, and one benchmark—is now also served as a typed /api/ecosystem.json envelope (PR #145, merged).
This document locates the project at the seam between three things that don't usually appear on the same map:

• Enterprise digital-twin platforms (Simile's $100M raise)
• Agent-native payments (x402 at $600M annualized)
• Prediction-market consumers (30% of Polymarket wallets are AI agents)
The payment rail is what makes both readings simultaneously correct.
